page_content:
Prerequisite: SPHL602; or permission of instructor.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

HLSA791 Advanced Research Seminar II (3 Credits)

Introduces pre-candidates at the end of their coursework to methods for locating, downloading and processing secondary data sources with complex survey design. The course emphasizes analysis of the Medical Expenditure Panel Survey (MEPS) data with Stata statistical software. The analysis and synthesis skills acquired throughout the students’ doctoral coursework are applied to write and conduct analysis for a publishable journal article.

Restriction: Must be in a major in SPHL-School of Public Health; or permission of instructor.
